notes: Brighter boot drift stars. Per-star baseAlpha bumped from 0.45-0.95 to 0.65-1.0, and the three star color channels (rare violet, cyan accent, mostly white) bumped from 0.50/0.55 to 0.80/0.85 alpha. Size, drift speed, twinkle range, count (50), and prefers-reduced-motion opt-out all retained, so the field remains the same calm ambient layer behind boot — just more visible on bright daylight iPad screens in the cold aisle. No change to the v1.6.43 ENTER circle, no change to the app-wide #bgCanvas fiber mesh.
